query:
SELECT c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, i.id as item_id, i.name as item_name, 
       CASE WHEN i.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND i.imageUrl != '' THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END as tem_imagem
FROM menu_categories c
LEFT JOIN menu_items i ON i.categoryId = c.id
WHERE LOWER(c.name) LIKE '%bebida%'
ORDER BY c.id, i.id;
